question: For the half-hour warning, did you want to ask to see proof from the courier before trusting the letter?
answer: The carrier was a Kurdish Peshmerga (a Kurdish fighter), so I trusted him with the letter. A friend of mine also knew him and confirmed that he was trustworthy.
